svg.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(3, 3, 3); height: 16px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible; width: 16px

path.style: transition: none !important; animation-duration: 0s !important; animation-delay: -0.0001s; animation-play-state: paused; fill: rgb(3, 3, 3); transform-origin: 0px 0px; transition-property: none; visibility: visible
